education.area: Electrical Engineering with Minor in Mathematical science

experiences.name: ECE Department, Northeastern University
summary: Interpretability of black box models is often complicated and needs a prodigious amount of analysis. Our collaboration with Harvard medical school enables us to study the applicability of our methods on biomedical data, where we focus on developing novel learning algorithms to aid in the discovery of subtypes of a lung disease called Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease (COPD).

experiences.name: Astar (Institute for Infocomm Research)
summary: Efficient WLAN connection of a client, moving from one access point to another with sensor assistance and power efficient real-time WLAN data transfer. Setting up a WiFi module and measuring power profile of WL1837MOD WlinkTM. Using sensors (accelerometer) for Motion detection by machine learning algorithms. Using sensors for detecting heart rate and breath rate
